form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fourth on April 9 over 410m at Horsham behind Liddell, beaten 12 lengths (23.83) in a Grade 5. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished 5th over 510m at Sale beaten 8 lengths (29.18) behind Lose My Mind in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 8. Has a sharp 25.93 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
